content: NATS JetStream publishing with headers and idempotency: js.PublishMsg with nats.Header{Nats-Msg-Id: []string{id}} for publish-side dedup. Alternative: js.Publish(ctx, subject, data, jetstream.WithMsgID(id)). Dedup window configured via DuplicateWindow on StreamConfig. Headers propagate trace_id via nats.Header. Pull consumers use Messages() iterator for work-queue single-message fetch pattern. Consume() for callback-based continuous processing. Fetch(n) for batch fetch.
